params.name: The Raft of the Medusa
params.description:
On Oct 1, 1819 AD, Géricault completed the painting The Raft of the Medusa.
This oil painting is the work of the French Romantic painter Géricault. Its content is based on a real event: the ship Medusa sank due to the negligence of the captain during a cruise. The high-ranking officials, including the captain, escaped on a small boat, while the remaining 150 crew members were left on the ship. They made a raft to try to survive and drifted at sea for a long time, but only about ten people sur …
